title: Elph settings configuration
description: User preferences at ~/.elph/settings.json (or settings.jsonc). Optional project overrides live at <workDir>/.agents/elph/settings.json — same shape; merged on load, saved to home only.

syncInterval.description: Go duration between automatic models.dev syncs at startup (for example 24h, 12h, 30m). Default 24h.

theme.description: UI color scheme. auto follows the terminal appearance.

showThinking.description: Stream and display model reasoning in the chat.

autoExpandThinking.description: Start thinking blocks expanded in the chat.

useRawPaste.description: Insert pasted text verbatim in the input prompt. When false, long pastes collapse to [Pasted: N lines] with preview/edit via ctrl+o.

stickyScroll.description: Pin the latest user prompt to the top of the viewport while scrolling assistant replies.

preferedResponseLanguage.description: Reply language. inherit matches the user's message language; any other value fixes the default (for example English, Indonesian). The model still switches when the user explicitly requests another language.

thinkingBudgets.description: Custom token budgets per thinking level for budget-based reasoning models.

session.description: Runtime selections restored on startup. providerId and modelId are persisted in home settings; project settings may supply defaults only when home has no selection.

providerId.description: Last selected provider id (filename stem under ~/.elph/providers). Saved to ~/.elph on change.

modelId.description: Last selected model id for the active provider. Saved to ~/.elph on change.

thinkingLevel.description: Active thinking level shown in the footer.
